events.title: Scottish Craft Beer Festival
events.description: 20 Scottish breweries, live tasting notes, food pairings. Tickets £15 includes first pint.

events.title: Pub Quiz — Monthly
events.description: Eight rounds, £2 entry per person, winner takes the pot. Tables of up to six. Book in advance.

events.title: Scottish Derby — Live
events.description: Celtic vs Rangers. Doors open 11am. First come, first served.

events.title: Live Music — The Heilan Coos
events.description: Traditional Scottish folk band, two sets. No entry charge.
